name: BlackSky Technology Inc.
description: BlackSky Technology Inc. is a leading provider of real-time geospatial intelligence. The company operates one of the world's most advanced low-earth orbit small satellite constellations, optimized to capture images of cost-effective, high-frequency locations. BlackSky's proprietary Spectra AI software platform processes data from its own constellation and other third-party sensors to deliver on-demand insights and analytics. By monitoring global events and activities as they happen, BlackSky provides critical intelligence to government agencies and commercial enterprises, enabling them to make informed decisions with speed and confidence.
